differences.production: Single dense column with tight vertical rhythm and minimal outer breathing room.
differences.prototype: Clear page shell with larger gutters, section separation, and a two-column main/right-rail composition.

differences.production: Hierarchy is table-first; contextual layers are compressed (match context, progression, and secondary modules).
differences.prototype: Stronger hierarchy: global header -> match hero -> tabbed sections -> analytics -> tables -> supporting side modules.

differences.production: Smaller, flatter typographic contrast; headers, labels, and data compete for attention.
differences.prototype: More deliberate size/weight contrast with clearer heading-to-metadata separation.

differences.production: Mostly uniform navy surfaces with bright metric colors that feel harsher and less tiered.
differences.prototype: Richer tonal layering and accent discipline (reds/greens/cyans) that guide focus.

differences.production: Radius usage feels less consistent across tabs/cards/chips.
differences.prototype: More consistent rounded system across containers, pills, and controls.

differences.production: Flatter cards with limited depth separation.
differences.prototype: Soft glow + shadow layering creates clearer panel depth and section boundaries.

differences.production: Icon/avatar/pick-ban visuals appear smaller and less prominent relative to row height.
differences.prototype: Image elements are more consistently sized and integrated into visual hierarchy.

top_3_fixes: Rebuild the macro layout shell to match prototype structure: restore broader gutters, section spacing, and right-rail module rhythm.
Retune typography/hierarchy tokens: larger section headings, clearer weight tiers, and reduced visual competition in table numbers/labels.
Standardize visual system tokens (radius, border, shadow, icon/avatar sizes) to match prototype depth and polish.
